name: Ali Nasiripour
summary: Network Infrastructure Engineer with 5 years of experience designing, deploying, and managing enterprise network and server infrastructure across 50+ multi-site environments in the hospitality industry. Deep expertise in Cisco Meraki full-stack deployments (MX/MS/MR), Sophos firewall administration, and network segmentation across LAN/WAN environments. Proven track record in leading network modernization projects, Tier 3 escalation support, VMware/Hyper-V virtualization, and Windows Server ecosystem management. Thrives in fast-paced, event-driven environments requiring after-hours responsiveness and minimal-downtime operations.

experience.title: Disaster Recovery / Backup Engineer
bullets: Engineer and administer Cisco Meraki full-stack infrastructure (MX security appliances, MS switches, MR access points) across 50+ hotel and resort properties, including firmware rollouts, network segmentation, and Meraki Dashboard-based monitoring.
Lead VLAN redesign and network segmentation projects during site refresh cycles, coordinating hardware staging, cutover scheduling, and on-site team support with minimal service disruption.
Administer Sophos firewall infrastructure including VPN policy management, traffic filtering, and security posture hardening across distributed multi-site environments.
Manage VMware vSphere, Hyper-V, and Scale Computing HC3 virtualization platforms hosting 200+ physical and virtual servers across on-premises and cloud environments.
Provision and manage Azure infrastructure including Virtual Machines, VPN Gateways, Blob Storage, and Entra ID integrations for hybrid identity and access management.
Design and maintain centralized syslog architecture aggregating logs from firewalls, switches, and servers to enhance visibility and accelerate incident response.
Coordinate firmware upgrades and infrastructure patching across production environments using structured maintenance windows to minimize operational disruption.
Provide Tier 3 network escalation support for complex routing, firewall, VPN, and authentication issues across all supported sites.
Develop SOPs and network documentation to ensure operational resilience and facilitate knowledge transfer across the infrastructure team.

experience.title: Network Analyst
bullets: Led full network modernization project at Grouse Mountain Resort, replacing end-of-life L2/L3 switches, Sophos firewalls, servers, and wireless infrastructure with current-generation equipment.
Deployed and configured Cisco Meraki wireless and switching infrastructure at multiple properties, including SSID configuration, traffic shaping, and guest network isolation via Meraki Dashboard.
Implemented RADIUS authentication to enhance access control and strengthen on-premises security posture across multi-site Windows Server environments.
Administered Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and Group Policy across multi-site Windows Server environments, maintaining consistent security and configuration standards.
Managed Azure cloud instances including VM provisioning, VPN tunnel configuration, and resource monitoring for hosted workloads.
Automated repetitive operational tasks using PowerShell to improve team efficiency and reduce manual overhead.
Monitored and managed LAN/WAN, VPN, and firewall activity, reducing recurring incidents and improving mean time to resolution.
Provided Tier 3 escalation support for routing, VLAN, and connectivity issues across all supported resort and hotel properties.

experience.title: IT Network Administrator
bullets: Supported Windows Server environments, network hardware, and firewall infrastructure for the organization.
Managed system patching, OS updates, and virtualization environments to maintain uptime and security compliance.
Maintained hybrid backup environments and contributed to disaster recovery readiness.

experience.title: Customer Support
bullets: Delivered technical support for internet, mobile, and TV services; diagnosed connectivity and device issues across iOS and Android platforms.
